mapper.select: select id, bid_id, file_name, original_name, file_url, file_size, file_type, file_stage, parse_status, parse_report_id, create_time, update_time from tdw_tender_file where bid_id = #{bidId} order by create_time desc, id desc
mapper.insert: insert into tdw_tender_file(bid_id, file_name, original_name, file_url, file_size, file_type, file_stage, parse_status, parse_report_id, create_time, update_time) values(#{bidId}, #{fileName}, #{originalName}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, #{fileStage}, #{parseStatus}, #{parseReportId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update tdw_tender_file set parse_status = #{parseStatus}, parse_report_id = #{parseReportId}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
